themes.exampleQuote: I always make sure to try their new flavors because it always surprises me!
All the flavors tasted fresh and have robust flavors.
The portion of these two standards is mind boggling. I've been to several locations and never received a portion so small for $7.
Me and my dog's favorite spot. I always order him a small scoop of vanilla with waffle wedge.
I loved the waffle cones which they make fresh throughout the day.

notable_quote: I always make sure to try their new flavors because it always surprises me.
sentiment_summary: Reviewers consistently celebrate the flavor invention and freshness of the product, but a recurring undercurrent around portion size and pricing, particularly at the Bakery Square location, keeps the sentiment signal from matching the enthusiasm the city otherwise shows this place.
quarter_narrative: Twenty-nine Pittsburgh creators filmed Jeni's this quarter and posted none of it back to Jeni's own channels. That 147,000-play TikTok footprint exists entirely without the brand's participation: no Jeni's TikTok account, and the Instagram, while active, posted just 12 times in 30 days at a 0.49 percent engagement rate. The gooey butter cake caption from @justapittsburghgirl, 48,400 plays on a single video, is doing more to drive Larimer foot traffic than anything the brand itself published this spring. Meanwhile, Page's holds the Sweets family lead on social momentum, a signal Jeni's has the creator ecosystem to challenge but hasn't yet converted into owned reach. Closing the gap between what Pittsburgh is saying about this place and what Jeni's says about itself is the clearest path from #3 in Sweets to the top of it.
tldr_read: Dominant TikTok creator footprint, low own-channel engagement, and a portion-size friction point in reviews. Icons of the Burgh, #2 in Pittsburgh Ice Cream, #3 in Pittsburgh Sweets.
tldr_meaning: The creator signal is already doing the heavy lifting; whether Jeni's rises in the Sweets family depends on whether the brand's own Instagram engagement rate climbs toward the creator energy surrounding it.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: Second In Ice Cream, Third In Sweets. The City Is Filming; Jeni's Feed Is Quiet.

playbook.headline: Close the Instagram engagement gap now
playbook.action: At 0.49 percent engagement on 12 posts last month, the account is publishing but not pulling. Shift toward the flavor-reveal and behind-the-counter formats that the 29 creators already know work here.

playbook.headline: Address the portion perception in public
playbook.action: Two distinct reviews flag portion size as a disappointment versus other Jeni's locations. A pinned response or a clarifying update on Google would stop review sentiment from drifting below the family median of 83.

playbook.headline: Build a TikTok presence around existing creator energy
playbook.action: With 29 unique creators and 147,532 plays this quarter and no Jeni's TikTok account, even a minimal owned presence would let the brand redirect that audience rather than watch it pass through.
